full_text:
Discussion with Fernando about the main dataset for the paper

- GOAL: Submit Fernando's and the Tribus paper together, using the NKI
 > data in both

- We will not use the PREPOST data, but perform analysis on the NKI
 > dataset and use it as new data

- We have to formulate exactly which parts of the analysis can go to
 > the Tribus paper

- We want to show more technical aspects, eg. about clustering

- Start with the stromal, immune sets

- Fernando will upload the quantification tables, raw images and masks
 > to Datacloud

- NKI data: 10 slides with multiple cores (between 40 and 150), about
 > 5000 cells/core

- The immune and stromal types were assigned by the old version of
 > Tribus completely

- Start with one clean slide, compare results between the previous and
 > new Tribus

- Think of comparing Tribus with 2-3 clustering methods

- Emphasise on speed

- Parallelization: within code (tree) is a big task, for future (if
 > needed). Teodora will look into parallelizing running multiple
 > samples at the same time

- Ziqi will start with the NKI data analysis

- Angela works on speeding up mask filtering, possibilities to
 > visualize multiple cores in the same window.
